active_mission: Keep the CodeX Coding Anchor boot path durable, compact, verifiable, and more autonomous inside clear lanes.
next_moves: Use bin/coding-anchor-boot --brief for normal daily landing.
Use bin/coding-anchor-boot --full when Stephen wants full orientation printed back out.
Default to action inside the active lane: make the reversible move, verify it, retry once when appropriate, and continue through safe next slices.
Attempt an independent read-only reviewer subagent after meaningful file changes before final closeout; use a labeled local review fallback only if subagents are unavailable.
Use bin/coding-anchor-next to select the next safe unblocked queued slice after boot or slice closeout.
Use bin/coding-anchor-start <task-id> to mark selected pending queue work in progress before execution.
Use bin/coding-anchor-loop --dry-run --max-slices 3 to preview bounded continuation without creating a background daemon.
Use protocols/concise-agentic-output.md and protocols/agentic-decision-rule.md when Stephen asks for sharper, faster, or more autonomous execution.
Use bin/coding-anchor-agentic-check to verify concise autonomy anchors.
Adapt useful codex-workflows patterns only after inspection, not by blind install.
Create mission notes for project-specific work.
Keep parent-folder doorway files as thin routers into this packet.
verified: Base packet exists inside Coding Anchor Files.
Parent folder is archive/quarantine, not live identity.
Hardened doctor checks parent doorway, shell syntax, JSON state, mission-state shape, and launch dry-run.
Doctor receipts include process ids to avoid same-second boot receipt collisions.
Autonomy contract now defaults to action inside clear active lanes while preserving hard stop gates.
Post-work review protocol requires attempted independent reviewer subagent review after meaningful file changes, with labeled local review fallback only if subagents are unavailable.
Next-slice queue commands and state exist for selecting safe unblocked follow-up work.
The queue now has an explicit start transition before strict done closeout.
Concise agentic output and decision protocols exist for reducing narration while preserving verification and hard stop gates.
